description: A designed text card. In small blue capitals at the top is 'PRESS RELEASE', followed by a large dark blue serif headline reading 'Homeland Security Task Force Investigation Leads to Indictment of Four Illegal Aliens from South America in Million Dollar Multistate Burglary Ring'. A short gold underline appears beneath the headline on a white background.
notable_text: PRESS RELEASE; Homeland Security Task Force Investigation Leads to Indictment of Four Illegal Aliens from South America in Million Dollar Multistate Burglary Ring
